title: lactuca scariola var. integrifolia
intro: Lactuca scariola var. integrifolia, also known as wild lettuce or bitter lettuce, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is characterized by its bitter and slightly sweet leaves. Traditionally, Lactuca scariola var. integrifolia has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its sedative, antispasmodic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, alleviating insomnia, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Lactuca scariola var. integrifolia typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea or using them as a tincture, although it can also be consumed raw in salads.
